description.en: The giant anteater is a large insectivorous mammal native to Central and South America, characterized by its long tubular snout.
description.zh: 大食蚁兽是一种原产于中南美洲的大型食虫哺乳动物，以其长长的管状吻部为特征。

anatomy.en: The giant anteater is one of the strangest-looking animals around! It has a tiny head, no teeth at all, and a snout that looks like a long vacuum cleaner tube. It also has a massive, bushy tail that looks like a flag. When it sleeps, it curls up and uses its tail as a warm, camouflaged blanket.
anatomy.zh: 大食蚁兽是周围长相最奇怪的动物之一！它的头很小，完全没有牙齿，还有一个看起来像长吸尘器管子的吻部。它还有一条像旗帜一样巨大而蓬松的尾巴。当它睡觉时，它会蜷缩起来，把尾巴当成温暖的伪装毯子。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Instead of teeth, it has a sticky, spaghetti-like tongue that is 2 feet long! It uses giant, sharp front claws to tear open tough termite mounds, then flicks its tongue in and out 150 times a minute. It can eat up to 30,000 ants and termites in a single day. Baby anteaters look like miniature adults and ride on their mom's back for almost a year.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它没有牙齿，取而代之的是一条长达2英尺的、像意大利面一样黏稠的舌头！它用巨大锋利的前爪撕开坚硬的白蚁丘，然后每分钟将舌头弹进弹出150次。它一天就能吃掉多达30,000只蚂蚁和白蚁。小食蚁兽看起来像缩小版的成年食蚁兽，会在妈妈的背上骑将近一年。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They roam across the grassy savannas and dense rainforests of Central and South America. Sadly, their homes are being taken over by farms and roads, putting them at risk.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们在中南美洲长满草的大草原和茂密的热带雨林中漫游。可悲的是，它们的家园正在被农场和公路占据，使它们面临危险。

habitat.text_en: Tropical and subtropical grasslands, savannas, and forests of South America
habitat.text_zh: 南美热带和亚热带草原、稀树草原和森林
